title: Top 25 GTM Engineering Voices of 2026
subtitle: The most influential builders, educators, and thought leaders shaping GTM Engineering
methodology: Ranked by cross-list appearances, LinkedIn follower growth, posting frequency, and relevance to GTM Engineering. Sources include Go-to-Market Alliance, RevOps community lists, Clay ecosystem, and independent creator tracking.

voices.name: Eric Nowoslawski
voices.title: GTM Engineer & Content Creator
voices.bio: Clay's first and most visible GTM Engineer. Built the template library that became the industry standard. His LinkedIn breakdowns of enrichment workflows and outbound sequences get shared more than anyone else in the space.

voices.name: Matteo Tittarelli
voices.title: Founder & Director
voices.bio: Co-founded GTM Engineer School and publishes the Hypergrowth Substack. Mentored 35+ B2B SaaS startups on go-to-market. One of the first to codify the GTM Engineer role into a teachable framework.

voices.name: Nathan Lippi
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Runs Clay Bootcamp, the most popular training program for aspiring GTM Engineers. His cohorts have trained hundreds of practitioners who now work at startups and agencies building outbound pipelines.

voices.name: Jacki Leahy
voices.title: Head of GTM & Founder
voices.bio: Salesforce expert turned GTM strategist. Runs Activate the Magic, helping startups build their first GTM motion. Known for sharp, no-nonsense takes on CRM architecture and outbound automation.

voices.name: Madison Leonard
voices.title: Founder & GTM Leader
voices.bio: Led ClickUp's platform positioning before launching SaaS Secrets. 3x PMA Top Influencer. Hosts a podcast delivering actionable GTM frameworks that bridge product marketing and outbound engineering.

voices.name: Jeff Ignacio
voices.title: Head of GTM Operations
voices.bio: Scaled sales operations at Visier from $10M to $60M ARR. Publishes the RevOps Impact Newsletter. Now building GTM operations at Keystone AI, applying AI-native approaches to pipeline infrastructure.

voices.name: Crissy Saunders
voices.title: Co-founder & CEO
voices.bio: Runs CS2, a GTM operations agency that builds revenue systems for B2B SaaS companies at scale. One of the first to productize GTM Engineering as a service offering, training teams on Clay and outbound automation.

voices.name: Elias Stravik
voices.title: GTM Engineer
voices.bio: One of the few people with 'GTM Engineer' as their actual title. Creates customer-first GTM strategies at The Kiln. Shares AI use cases and forward-thinking GTM practices on LinkedIn.

voices.name: Maja Voje
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Authored 'Go-to-Market Strategist,' the most comprehensive book on GTM methodology. Worked with Heineken, Bayer, and Google. Has taught 7,500+ companies how to structure their go-to-market motions.

voices.name: Rosalyn Santa Elena
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Built The RevOps Collective into the largest community for revenue operations professionals. Shares frameworks for scalable RevOps models with a focus on GTM alignment that GTM Engineers reference constantly.

voices.name: Leore Spira
voices.title: Fractional CRO & RevOps Advisor
voices.bio: Advises growth-stage companies on scalable revenue infrastructure. Her posts on data-driven GTM strategy and RevOps architecture draw heavy engagement from the GTM Engineering community.

voices.name: Asia Corbett
voices.title: VP, RevOps Strategy
voices.bio: Leads RevOps strategy at Demandbase and built the RevGenius community into a 40K+ member hub. Her content on GTM data strategy and change management is required reading for ops-minded engineers.

voices.name: Natalie Furness
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Pioneered the automation-first approach to revenue operations. Her company, RevOps Automated, builds the kind of data-driven pipeline systems that GTM Engineers aspire to create.

voices.name: Daniel Kuperman
voices.title: Head of Core Product Marketing & GTM
voices.bio: 20+ year career spanning enterprise launches and positioning at Atlassian. Mentors the next generation through the Product Marketing Alliance community. His GTM playbooks influence how teams structure their outbound.

voices.name: Anjai Lal
voices.title: GTM Leader, Strategy & Enablement
voices.bio: Applies management consulting rigor to GTM enablement at Google Cloud. Champions data-driven enablement programs that align sales and engineering teams around measurable outcomes.

voices.name: Sean Lane
voices.title: SVP Portfolio Operations
voices.bio: Hosts the Operations podcast, covering how to scale HubSpot and Salesforce stacks. His episodes on outbound infrastructure and CRM architecture are go-to resources for GTM Engineers building systems.

voices.name: Eddie Reynolds
voices.title: CEO & Revenue Operations Consultant
voices.bio: Runs Union Square Consulting, helping B2B companies build revenue operations from scratch. His strategic approach to Salesforce implementation and GTM tooling resonates with engineers who build these systems.

voices.name: Darrell Alfonso
voices.title: Director of Marketing Strategy & Operations
voices.bio: Bridges marketing operations and revenue operations at Indeed. His content on marketing automation aligned with GTM engineering principles makes him a crossover voice both communities follow.

voices.name: Matthew Volm
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Built RevOps Co-op into a leading platform for revenue operations job seekers and practitioners. Shares best practices and curates opportunities that increasingly overlap with GTM Engineering roles.

voices.name: Liza Adams
voices.title: AI & Exec Advisor, Fractional CMO
voices.bio: Guides organizations through AI transformation with 20+ years of senior marketing experience. Her work on AI-powered GTM strategies sits at the intersection of marketing leadership and technical automation.

voices.name: Shoshana Kordova
voices.title: Founder & Lead Product Marketer
voices.bio: 3x founding PMM with a journalism background that brings clarity to complex GTM narratives. Mentors through Give & Tech and teaches at universities, shaping the next wave of GTM practitioners.

voices.name: Sara McNamara
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Award-winning expert in marketing automation and CRM integration. Builds the kind of technical marketing infrastructure that GTM Engineers extend with enrichment and outbound layers.

voices.name: Erol Toker
voices.title: Technical Solopreneur
voices.bio: Builds micro-SaaS tools focused on eliminating manual data entry and boosting sales productivity. His developer-first approach to GTM tooling resonates with engineers who want to build, not just configure.

voices.name: Justin Graci
voices.title: Manager, Partner GTM & Enablement
voices.bio: Thought leader in GTM, CRM, and AI at HubSpot. Regular speaker at industry events with strong cross-functional skills that bridge partner operations and technical GTM execution.

voices.name: Jen Igartua
voices.title: CEO
voices.bio: Runs Go Nimbly, one of the original RevOps consultancies that helped define the discipline. Her insights on scalable revenue growth for SaaS companies shape how GTM teams architect their systems.
